reach_why: Combines preconceptual novelty, replay drift, and label-structure dissociation into a broader failure mode, but not wholly unprecedented.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links open-world detection, generative memory drift, and semantic hollowing into one epistemic pathology.
falsifiable_why: Test by measuring novelty errors as replay drifts and labels persist after latent structure degrades.
explanation: Models can confidently misrecognize reality when memory drifts, concepts lag experience, and labels outlive understanding.
